## Overview

Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world's largest cloud infrastructure provider, offering 200+ managed services across compute, storage, database, networking, security, and analytics. AWS is the most widely adopted cloud platform across UK Government, used by HMRC, DWP, Home Office, MOD, and NHS Digital among others. The eu-west-2 (London) region provides 3 availability zones for UK-sovereign workloads.

## Products & Services

| Product | Category | Relevance to Project |
|---------|----------|---------------------|
| ECS Fargate / EKS | Container Orchestration | Application hosting for data pipeline, API, frontend |
| RDS PostgreSQL | Managed Database | Primary relational database with PostGIS support |
| SQS / SNS | Messaging | Async data ingestion pipeline |
| API Gateway | API Management | REST API management for submission and public APIs |
| S3 | Object Storage | Bulk data export, audit trail archive |
| CloudFront | CDN | Citizen-facing service acceleration |
| KMS | Encryption | Key management for data at rest encryption |
| Secrets Manager | Secrets | API credential rotation and management |
| WAF | Security | Web application firewall for OWASP protection |
| CloudWatch | Monitoring | Infrastructure and application observability |
| Managed Grafana | Dashboards | Custom operational and business dashboards |

## Pricing Model

Pay-as-you-go with reserved instance discounts for committed workloads. GBP billing available for UK Government accounts. Estimated 3-year infrastructure TCO for this project: GBP 195K-250K (with reserved instances).

Key pricing points (eu-west-2):
- RDS PostgreSQL db.r6g.large: ~USD 0.34/hr on-demand; ~USD 0.13/hr 1-year RI
- SQS Standard: USD 0.40 per million requests
- API Gateway REST: USD 3.50 per million requests
- ECS Fargate: per vCPU-hour and per GB-hour

## UK Government Presence

- G-Cloud listed: Yes (G-Cloud 14, Digital Marketplace)
- DOS listed: Yes
- UK data centres: Yes (eu-west-2, London, 3 availability zones)
- NCSC assessed: Yes (Cloud Security Principles published)
- Cyber Essentials Plus: Yes
- GBP billing: Yes
- UK Government support tier: Yes (dedicated)
- Adopted by: HMRC, DWP, Home Office, MOD, NHS Digital, CMA

## Compliance

| Standard | Status |
|----------|--------|
| ISO 27001 | Certified |
| SOC 2 Type II | Certified |
| UK GDPR | Compliant |
| Cyber Essentials Plus | Certified |
| NCSC Cloud Security Principles | Assessed and published |
| UK data residency | Available (eu-west-2) |

## Strengths

- Widest UK Government adoption with established community of practice
- 3 availability zones in London for high availability
- Comprehensive managed services reducing operational burden
- GBP billing eliminates FX risk for UK Government budgets
- Mature IaC support (CloudFormation, Terraform, CDK)
- G-Cloud procurement -- simplified buying process

## Weaknesses

- Complex pricing model requires dedicated FinOps discipline
- Proprietary services create vendor lock-in risk (mitigate with abstraction layers)
- Egress charges can be significant for data-intensive workloads
- Support costs additional unless on Enterprise Support plan

## Projects Referenced In

- UK Fuel Price Transparency Service (Project 001) -- recommended cloud platform
